document_title: SHF Holdings, Inc. — Form 8-K/A (Amendment No. 1) — Item 4.02 corrective amendment clarifying Audit Committee discussion with MGO
notes: Source is SHF Holdings, Inc.'s Form 8-K/A (Amendment No. 1) filed and signed August 22, 2025 with a Date of Report (Date of earliest event reported) of August 13, 2025. The Amendment cures an omission in the Original 8-K (filed August 14, 2025) by adding the Item 4.02(a)(3)-required disclosure that the Audit Committee discussed the restatement with the Company's independent registered public accounting firm, Macias Gini & O'Connell LLP (MGO). The underlying restatement covers the three months ended March 31, 2025 (the 'Non-Reliance Period'), originally filed with the SEC on May 16, 2025 as the Company's Form 10-Q; the restatement arises from incorrect Black-Scholes inputs (expected term and stock price) used to calculate stock-based compensation expense, and is expected to result in an approximately $500,000 increase to both previously reported operating expenses and net loss. The amended Form 10-Q including the restated financial statements was filed on August 14, 2025 — the same calendar date as the Original 8-K. The fixture pressures (i) form-type and amendment-number identifier recognition with the Amendment No. 1 designator; (ii) multi-date chronology including the 46-day, 89-day, 9-day, and 8-day intervals; (iii) the double-negative emerging-growth-company opt-out checkbox semantics (registrant IS an EGC and has NOT opted out of the extended transition period); (iv) two distinct registered securities (SHFS common stock and SHFSW warrants) with the ticker-convention relationship; (v) the specific Black-Scholes input pair identified as incorrect; (vi) the Explanatory Note's clarification framing implying an omission in the Original 8-K; (vii) recovery of two events on August 14, 2025 in sequential order (Original 8-K filed first, amended 10-Q filed afterward, per the 'Subsequent to the filing of the Original Form 8-K' language); (viii) the typographical run-on 'completedits' verbatim in the source.
